title: filago germanica var. canescens
intro: Filago germanica var. canescens, also known as woolly false flax, is a subspecies of the Filago germanica plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of woolly false flax include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Woolly false flax can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to support immune function.
